# portal-home-progress - Indicator => too hard to see

@Dinkh @mxmrtns : Maybe I am just getting old, but for me a div with 2px height and little contrast is very hard to spot on Desktop.

It feels a little bit better on mobile. If we want to stick to the secondary color, 4px is worth a shot. With the primary color 2px would be ok.
